mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, reply_to, image, likes, is_hot, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{replyTo}, #{image}, 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comment SET likes = likes - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND likes > 0
